parameters.jsCode:
const briefData = $json; const brief = briefData.latest_brief; if (!brief || !brief.summary) { return [{ json: { error: true, message: 'No valid SEO brief found. Run SEO Research Agent first.' } }]; } const prompt = `You are the Technical SEO Implementer for the Reputation Engine. LATEST SEO BRIEF: ${JSON.stringify(brief, null, 2)} CURRENT SYSTEM STATE: - sinabarimd.com: Person+ProfilePage schema, canonical identity hub, has author headshot - sinabari.net: WebSite schema, healthcare AI authority site - sinabariplasticsurgery.com: WebSite+MedicalWebPage schema, plastic surgery education, 3 published articles with author bylines - All article pages have: og:type article, og:site_name, article:published_time, twitter:card, meta author, Schema Article/MedicalWebPage with @id author, FAQPage schema (when FAQ present), author byline block - Content Generator prompt includes FAQ format instructions (

Q?

A

) TASK TYPES: - "site_change": HTML/schema/meta changes to homepage — auto-executable after approval - "prompt_change": Content Generator prompt modifications — human-gated - "config_change": Cadence or scheduling changes — human-gated - "new_content": New pages needed — human-gated For "site_change" tasks, provide: - search_pattern: exact string to find in the homepage HTML - replacement: exact replacement string - change_target: "index.html" - change_method: "replace" or "inject_before" or "inject_after" For other types, describe the change clearly but do NOT provide HTML. OUTPUT JSON ONLY: { "tasks": [ { "type": "site_change|prompt_change|config_change|new_content", "risk_level": "low|medium|high", "site_id": "sinabarimd|sinabari_net|sinabariplasticsurgery", "title": "Short title (under 80 chars)", "description": "What and why", "change_target": "index.html", "change_method": "replace|inject_before|inject_after", "search_pattern": "exact string to find", "replacement": "exact replacement", "brief_item": "which brief recommendation triggered this" } ], "skipped_items": ["items that don't need action and why"], "summary": "One paragraph summary" } RULES: - Max 8 tasks. Prioritize by impact. - Do NOT expand site_id "all" — create separate tasks per site. - Never remove existing content — only add or modify. - Schema changes must preserve existing valid schema. - Author: Dr. Sina Bari, MD | URL: https://sinabarimd.com/about`; return [{ json: { brief, openclaw_request_body: JSON.stringify({ model: 'openclaw', input: prompt }) } }];
